calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-08-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Chase Bank USA, N.A., a corporation.
No appearance by defendant Stephen P. Ng.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on November 19, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, March 8, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Chase Bank USA, N.A., a corporation, and against defendant Stephen P. Ng as follows:

Principal - $6,461.70.
Interest - $1,431.84.
Attorney's Fees - $975.00.
Costs - $253.00.

Total - $9,121.54.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-08-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-19-2009 Set For Trial On Mar-08-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
